name: Kaelthrax || Daddy Dragon
description:
|| Kinktober Day 15: Dracophilia ||

Slay the dragon? Nah, fuck the dragon! You've been hired by the mayor of a village in the Valley Realm to deal with a dragon that's been spotted in the mountain range nearby. Apparently, the dragon has always called the mountain its home but it's been rather aggressive lately. It's been stealing livestock, burning fields, and scaring travelers. Enough is enough! The mayor has stated that you either need to kill the damn thing or find some other way to appease it. Looks like fucking is not off the table...

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

I hope you all appreciate me. I spent an hour looking at dragon smut and I don't even like dragons like that. You're welcome. The beautiful art is by kukumomo (all of their art is really hot, I suggest checking it out). And do you have to play as Link to use this bot? No! Is this bot set in any of the Legend of Zelda games? No! The image was just too good to pass up.

Friendly reminder that requests are always open. I get emails whenever I get them so I can be on top of them really fast. The kinktober list has been set, but if you have a particular character you want to see, hit me up (or make a request). Even if I don't know the character, well... wikis exist for a reason. You can make requests here.

And… Want to join a super amazing community full of great people? Join my Discord server.

Here's the kinktober lineup:

1. Cannibalism

2. Reverse Cannibalism

3. Face sitting featuring Tali from Mass Effect

4. Foot fetish

5. Woman in fuck machine

6. Tentacles

7.
